# Allow-listed ceph/s3-tests node IDs — the gating set for the s3tests workflow.
#
# These tests are expected to PASS and CI fails if any regress. They were
# verified to pass deterministically (two clean-server runs) against the
# pinned upstream commit (S3TESTS_REF in ../workflows/s3tests.yml).
#
# One pytest node ID per line; blank lines and lines starting with '#' are
# ignored. Keep sorted. See README.md for how to grow this list.
#
# Coverage: bucket create/delete/head/location, object put/get/head/delete,
# ranged and multi-part reads, CopyObject, DeleteObjects, ListObjects v1/v2
# (prefix, delimiter, pagination, encoding-type, max-keys edges), multipart
# semantics (part validation: InvalidPart/InvalidPartOrder/EntityTooSmall/
# MalformedXML; ListMultipartUploads/ListParts; UploadPartCopy incl. range
# errors), and S3 XML error responses (NoSuch*, NotImplemented, precondition
# and range errors).
